description:
ItemKey and PointerKey are trivial wrappers around Bedrock.Encoding.Tuple:
- ItemKey.pack/unpack just calls Tuple.pack/unpack
- PointerKey.pack/unpack just calls Tuple.pack/unpack
- PointerKey has unused functions: all_range/0, queue_range/1

Options:
1. Delete both modules, use Tuple directly in Store
2. Keep PointerKey.visible_range/1 as a helper in Store

Update store.ex key_encoding references and tests.
title: Remove encoding wrapper modules
